entities.name: PHTHALIC ACID DIAMIDE INSECTICIDES
entities.description: A class of insecticides effective against lepidopteran pests.

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A polyphagous lepidopteran pest that threatens several crops worldwide.

entities.name: RYANODINE RECEPTORS
entities.description: Target sites in insects that interact with phthalic acid diamide insecticides.

entities.name: FLUBENDIAMIDE
entities.description: A specific phthalic acid diamide insecticide used to inhibit larval growth in H. armigera.

entities.name: LARVAL GROWTH
entities.description: The growth process of H. armigera larvae, which is inhibited by flubendiamide.

entities.name: CA2+-ATPASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: An enzyme activity accelerated by flubendiamide in a dose-dependent manner.

entities.name: MITOCHONDRIAL FUNCTION
entities.description: The overall functioning of mitochondria, which is impeded by flubendiamide.

entities.name: COMPLEX I
entities.description: A mitochondrial complex whose activity is interfered with by flubendiamide.

entities.name: F0F1-ATPASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: An enzyme activity in mitochondria inhibited by flubendiamide.

entities.name: CYTOCHROME C
entities.description: A protein whose efflux is induced by flubendiamide, indicating mitochondrial toxicity.

entities.name: MITOCHONDRIAL TOXICITY
entities.description: Toxicity occurring in mitochondria induced by flubendiamide.

entities.name: LACTATE DEHYDROGENASE
entities.description: An enzyme inhibited by flubendiamide.

entities.name: H2O2
entities.description: Hydrogen peroxide, the accumulation of which is inhibited by flubendiamide.

entities.name: LIPID PEROXIDATION
entities.description: A process of oxidative degradation of lipids, prevented by flubendiamide.

entities.name: CYTOCHROME P450
entities.description: An enzyme that exhibits a dose-dependent increasing trend in insecticide-fed larvae.

entities.name: GENERAL ESTERASES
entities.description: Enzymes that exhibit a dose-dependent increasing trend in insecticide-fed larvae.

entities.name: ACHE
entities.description: Acetylcholinesterase, an enzyme that exhibits a dose-dependent increasing trend in insecticide-fed larvae.

entities.name: ANTIOXIDANT ENZYMES
entities.description: A group of enzymes including catalase and superoxide dismutase that increase in response to flubendiamide.

entities.name: CATALASE
entities.description: An antioxidant enzyme that exhibits a dose-dependent increasing trend.

entities.name: SUPEROXIDE DISMUTASE
entities.description: An antioxidant enzyme that exhibits a dose-dependent increasing trend.

entities.name: ALKALINE PHOSPHATASE
entities.description: An enzyme that exhibits dose-dependent inhibition in insecticide-fed larvae.

entities.name: MIDGUT PROTEASES
entities.description: Enzymes in the midgut that are inhibited by flubendiamide, except for amino peptidase.

entities.name: AMINO PEPTIDASE
entities.description: A midgut protease that does not exhibit dose-dependent inhibition.

entities.name: MITOCHONDRIAL DYSFUNCTION
entities.description: Harmful effect on mitochondria induced by flubendiamide leading to growth inhibition in H. armigera.
